info.title: Galaxy Workflow Development API
info.description: Validate, lint, clean, and convert Galaxy workflows against tool definitions

get.description: List all discovered workflows in the configured directory.

post.description: Re-discover workflows from the configured directory.

get.description: Validate a workflow's tool state against tool definitions.
Report stale tool state keys in a workflow.
Convert a native workflow to format2 with schema-aware state.
Convert a format2 workflow to native Galaxy format with schema-aware state.
Read configured directory root (Jupyter Contents API).

post.description: Create an untitled file or directory in the configured root.

get.description: List checkpoints for a file (Jupyter Contents API).

schema.title: Response List File Checkpoints Api Contents  Path  Checkpoints Get

post.description: Create a checkpoint snapshot of a file.
Restore a file from a stored checkpoint.

get.description: Read a file or directory by relative path.

post.description: Create an untitled file or directory inside {path}.

put.description:
Save (create-or-replace) a file or create a directory.

Optional ``If-Unmodified-Since`` header (RFC 7232, HTTP-date) enables conflict
detection: if the file's on-disk mtime is newer than the supplied date, the
server returns 409 instead of overwriting.

get.description: Lint a workflow (structural + tool state validation).

ConnectionResult.title: ConnectionResult
ConnectionResult.description:
Single connection between two steps.

status and mapping are orthogonal:
- status: whether the connection is valid (ok/invalid/skip)
- mapping: what collection type is being mapped over (None = direct match)

ConnectionStepResult.title: ConnectionStepResult
ConnectionStepResult.description: Connection validation result for one step.

has_details.title: Has Details
has_details.description:
True iff any step has connection data or step-level errors.

Precomputed here so templates don't need a mutable accumulator loop
(Jinja2 namespaces aren't in the Jinja2/Nunjucks shared subset).

ConnectionValidationReport.title: ConnectionValidationReport
ConnectionValidationReport.description: Connection validation results for one workflow.

ContentsModel-Input.title: ContentsModel
ContentsModel-Input.description: Jupyter Contents API-shaped model for files and directories.

ContentsModel-Output.title: ContentsModel
ContentsModel-Output.description: Jupyter Contents API-shaped model for files and directories.

CreateRequest.title: CreateRequest
CreateRequest.description: Body for POST /api/contents/{path} — create untitled file or directory under {path}.

ResolvedOutputType.title: ResolvedOutputType
ResolvedOutputType.description: Resolved collection type for a step output.

conversion_failure_lines.title: Conversion Failure Lines
conversion_failure_lines.description:
Pre-formatted per-step conversion failures.

Kept identical to the strings ``_format_conversion_failures`` emits so
templates stay inside the Jinja2/Nunjucks shared subset (no method calls).

RoundTripValidationResult.title: RoundTripValidationResult
RoundTripValidationResult.description: Result of validating a workflow's native→format2→native round-trip.

SingleRoundTripReport.title: SingleRoundTripReport
SingleRoundTripReport.description: JSON shape for single-file roundtrip validation.

StepIdMappingResult.title: StepIdMappingResult
StepIdMappingResult.description: Result of step ID matching between original and roundtripped workflows.

WorkflowIndex.title: WorkflowIndex
WorkflowIndex.description: Index of all workflows in the target directory.
